title: Opanea trinervia

taxonomy: Opanea trinervia is classified as a species of freshwater snail with the binomial nomenclature Opanea trinervia. It belongs to the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Littorinimorpha. Within the order Littorinimorpha, it is further classified as a member of the family Amnicolidae. Opanea trinervia is considered a species within the genus Opanea. This classification reflects its biological characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
